name: Rice Almondine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onion in butter until tender. Add broth, lemon juice, and garlic powder. Bring to a boil.
2. Stir in rice. Return to boil. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in green beans, almonds, and dill; cover. Let stand for 5 minutes.
